content.en:
"The problem of Blood Lake Ridge solved?"

Luo Wushuang and Xinghai didn't quite understand what it meant.

But soon, a piece of news came that shocked them all.

"The three Eternal Dao Realms of the Blood Lake Ridge have all fallen!!!"

Luo Wushuang was completely incredulous when he heard the news, and further information was quickly transmitted.

It was Ye Tian who killed the three Eternal Dao Realms, and it was a strong kill, so there was no difficulty.

It can be seen that Ye Tian's strength is far above the three Eternal Dao Realms of the Blood Lake Ridge.

"Ye Tian is the !!! of the Eternal Dao Realm"

Luo Wushuang was shocked.

If this is really the case, then Ye Tian's previous rhetoric is not right.

Ye Tian said that he joined Luoxia Pavilion before because of the light of Luoxia, but if it was for the light of Luoxia, then Ye Tian could not be the Eternal Dao Realm now!

But Ye Tian was the Eternal Dao Realm before joining Luoxia Pavilion, so why did he join Luoxia Pavilion?

"Could it be that Ye Tian knows that we have the Nine Lakes Mountain Token?" Luo Wushuang said.

Xing Hai frowned slightly: "It's not that there is no such possibility, your father obtained the Nine Lakes Mountain Token and entered it once, although he hid his identity, it doesn't mean that there is no Eternal Dao Realm to know." If Ye Tian knew about this matter and used the reason of joining Luoxia Pavilion to find the Nine Lakes Mountain Token, it was not impossible to find this possibility!"

"What then?"

Luo Wushuang asked.

Xing Hai sighed and said: "Ye Tian can easily kill the three Eternal Dao Realms of the Blood Lake Ridge, and he can definitely easily kill the Luo Shen City Lord, if he really wants to snatch the Nine Lakes Mountain Token, we can't help it." He deliberately showed his strength this time, which may be a signal. If we still pretend not to know, maybe he will act. Now, there is only one way, and that is to take the initiative to hand over the Jiuhu Mountain token and cooperate with Ye Tian. From the moment of view, Ye Tian is still very kind, at least he will not take our Jiuhu Mountain token in vain. If he promises to protect us forever, if he joins that mysterious force, we will have a backer. "

"Grandfather, this is the only way!"

Luo Wushuang nodded.

If Ye Tian heard this conversation, he would definitely be speechless.

He really didn't have this idea, and he didn't even know what the Nine Lakes Mountain Token was!

......

"Pavilion Master, do you have something to do with me?"

Ye Tian saw Luo Wushuang coming and asked.

After Luo Wushuang sat down, he said, "Ye Tian, you joined Luoxia Pavilion with the cultivation of the Eternal Dao Realm for the Nine Lakes Mountain Token, right?"

"Nine Lakes Mountain Token ???"

Ye Tian looked confused: "Pavilion Master, what is the Nine Lakes Mountain Token?"

Luo Wushuang was stunned and guessed wrong.

"Then why did you join Luo Xia Pavilion with the Eternal Dao Realm cultivator?" Luo Wushuang was curious.

Ye Tian knew that he was talking with Luo Xia's light, Luo Wushuang definitely didn't believe it, after all, he broke through to the Eternal Dao Realm in the Void Domain, and here he directly changed his copy body, and there was no breakthrough movement.

Let's be honest.

"Actually, I have indeed only broken through to the Eternal Dao Realm!" Ye Tian revealed: "It's just that I am now a clone, and my body has broken through to the Eternal Dao Realm in other places, and then I have re-refined an Eternal Dao Realm clone. "

"That's what happened!"

Luo Wushuang was somewhat convinced.

However, she revealed the matter of the Nine Lakes Mountain Token.

As long as Ye Tian went to investigate, he knew that the Nine Lakes Mountain Token was useless to hide, so he could only continue to cooperate with Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian, I want to have a cooperation with you!" Luo Wushuang said.

"Oh, cooperation? "

Ye Tian was a little interested.

Luo Wushuang said: "Luoxia Pavilion has a Jiuhu Mountain token, Jiuhu Mountain is a place where the mysterious big forces are assessed, once you pass the assessment, you can join the mysterious big force, that mysterious big force is extremely mysterious, even we don't know much about it, we only know that many top big forces in the ancient country want the Nine Lakes Mountain token." And this force is very free, without any restrictions, and does not care about status. It is even rumored that the lord of Ogu is one of the members. "

"Nine Lakes Mountain Token!"

Ye Tian is interested, if he joins this big force, he can get more information.

"I'm afraid it's hard to pass the assessment, right?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Luo Wushuang nodded: "It is true that the ordinary Eternal Dao Realm cannot pass the assessment, but Ye Tian, you may have hope." "

"What do you want to exchange for the Nine Lakes Mountain Token?" Ye Tian asked.

Luo Wushuang said: "I hope you will protect Luo Xia Pavilion forever." "

Shelter Loxia Pavilion forever?

Ye Tian pondered for a while, and finally decided: "In this way, if Luoxia Pavilion does not have the Eternal Dao Realm, I will protect Luoxia Pavilion forever." But after Luo Xia Pavilion is born in the Eternal Dao Realm, I will not shelter you anymore, but I will give you some resources as compensation, and this resource is not less than 50 million ancient coins, how about it?"

"Good!"

Luo Wushuang agreed.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and Luo Wushuang signed an agreement oath, and Xinghai also came to witness.

Then, Xinghai took the Jiuhu Mountain token.

In this way, Ye Tian was confused and got an opportunity.

......

"Suddenly, I got a Nine Lakes Mountain token, this luck is good, if you really join that mysterious force and get benefits, you will help Xinghai break through to the Eternal Dao Realm in the future!" Ye Tian decided.

This token can allow him to enter Jiuhu Mountain three times, and it doesn't matter if he uses it once.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian took the Jiuhu Mountain token and came directly to Jiuhu Mountain.

Jiuhu Mountain looks like nine peaks, and there seems to be a sea of clouds between the peaks.

However, this is just a fake Jiuhu Mountain, and the real Jiuhu Mountain has to be opened with a token before it can be entered.

Ye Tian took out the Jiuhu Mountain token and urged it.

In an instant, the token turned into a ray of light, enveloping him and entering a mysterious place.

This mysterious place is the real Jiuhu Mountain.

In the middle of a lake, there are nine giant mountains around it, each of which is made up of the eternal sequence to the rules of the Dao, containing endless mysteries.

"At the beginning of the assessment, please visit the Nine Divine Mountains and realize the secret technique of the pseudo-Dao species, and you can pass the assessment!"

"The time of enlightenment is 10 million to the Dao Era!"

Ten million Dao Realms is not a long time, and he has just killed the three Eternal Dao Realms of the Blood Lake Ridge, so naturally no force dares to provoke Luo Xia Pavilion.

Besides, he didn't think he needed 10 million Dao Era years.

"Let's go to enlightenment!"

Ye Tian silently understood.

Soon, he knew what the so-called Pseudo-Dao Secret Technique was.

The secret technique of the Dao seed must be the use of the power of the Dao seed after condensing the eternal Dao seed, and the so-called pseudo-Dao secret technique is the technique of simulating creation in the absence of the Dao seed, which has the mystery of the Dao secret technique, but the power is much worse.

This type of technique is called the Pseudo-Dao Secret Technique.

If you don't know anything about the Dao and don't have a high level of comprehension, you will naturally not be able to pass the assessment.

If it weren't for his deduction of the Dao Seed Secret Technique, he would now be sure to create a second-grade Eternal Dao Seed, otherwise he might not have been able to comprehend the Pseudo Dao Seed Secret Technique.
